title: Build a Multi-Stage Image
description:
## Compile in One Stage, Ship Another

A build context is prepared at **`/root/multilab`** with this multi-stage `Dockerfile`:

```dockerfile
FROM alpine:latest AS build
RUN echo 'compiled-artifact' > /app.bin

FROM alpine:latest
COPY --from=build /app.bin /app.bin
CMD ["cat", "/app.bin"]
```

The first stage produces an artifact; the final stage copies **only** that artifact — none of the build steps.

**Requirements:**
1. Build the image and tag it **`slimapp:1.0`**
2. Running it must print the artifact contents

> 💡 `cd /root/multilab && docker build -t slimapp:1.0 .`

hints.title: Build the multi-stage image
hints.body: docker build resolves all stages and keeps only the final one as the resulting image.

hints.title: Run it to confirm the artifact was copied
hints.body: The final stage's CMD prints the file copied from the build stage.

setup_commands.command:
printf 'FROM alpine:latest AS build
RUN echo "compiled-artifact" > /app.bin

FROM alpine:latest
COPY --from=build /app.bin /app.bin
CMD ["cat", "/app.bin"]
' > /root/multilab/Dockerfile

validation.description: Checks that slimapp:1.0 was built and prints the artifact copied from the build stage.

commands.description: Running the image prints the artifact
